recommendations.title: Hostage
recommendations.overview: When a mafia accountant is taken hostage on his beat, a police officer – wracked by guilt from a prior stint as a negotiator – must negotiate the standoff, even as his own family is held captive by the mob.

recommendations.title: My Way
recommendations.overview: A biopic of French pop star Claude Francois, most famous for co-writing the song 'My Way'. Tracing his life from his childhood in Egypt through his success in France to his untimely death in Paris in 1978.

recommendations.title: The Nest

recommendations.title: French Cuisine

recommendations.title: Mesrine: Killer Instinct
recommendations.overview: Jacques Mesrine, a loyal son and dedicated soldier, is back home and living with his parents after serving in the Algerian War. Soon he is seduced by the neon glamour of sixties Paris and the easy money it presents. Mentored by Guido, Mesrine turns h

recommendations.title: The Creator

recommendations.title: Mesrine: Public Enemy #1
recommendations.overview: After nearly two decades of legendary criminal feats, making him France's most notorious criminal while simultaneously feeding his desire for media attention and public adoration, Mesrine becomes increasingly paranoid and isolated, leading to a drama
A young British soldier must find his way back to safety after his unit accidentally abandons him during a riot in the streets of Belfast.

recommendations.title: Exterritorial
recommendations.overview: When her son vanishes inside a US consulate, ex-special forces soldier Sara does everything in her power to find him — and uncovers a dark conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Striking Rescue
recommendations.overview: A veteran Muay Thai expert goes on a take-no-prisoners mission of revenge after his wife and daughter are brutally murdered by mysterious forces.
